stemHtml: What is correct regarding an AMC (Acceptable Means of Compliance)?

options.a: It is not binding and other means may be utilised if preferred to demonstrate compliance with the applicable requirements.
options.b: It is binding and should be adhered to by all relevant parties to whom it is deemed to apply.
options.c: It may only be produced by EASA.
options.d: It may only be produced by ICAO.
